steps.title: Find the surfactant finding
steps.content: Chen and colleagues found that microplastic concentration alone could not explain the reduced wave activity. They discovered that surfactants released from microplastics have a much stronger wave-reducing effect.

steps.title: Reject unsupported claims
steps.content: B discusses composition, C discusses removing microplastics, and D discusses containing microplastics; none is stated in the passage. The supported finding is about surfactants' stronger effect on wave activity. The answer is A.
